ThingDef.Name: ISA_HeraldicGreatHelm
ThingDef.label: heraldic great helm (Amboise)
ThingDef.description: A greatly ornamented full-plate great helmet, often worn by jousters and heraldic champions and notable figures of notable houses in war. Portrays one’s noble status while still offering considerable protection in battle. \n\nThis great helm carries the colours of house Amboise.

ThingDef.label: heraldic great helm (Soren)
ThingDef.description: A greatly ornamented full-plate great helmet, often worn by jousters and heraldic champions and notable figures of notable houses in war. Portrays one’s noble status while still offering considerable protection in battle. \n\nThis great helm carries the colours of house Soren.

ThingDef.label: heraldic great helm (Hesse)
ThingDef.description: A greatly ornamented full-plate great helmet, often worn by jousters and heraldic champions and notable figures of notable houses in war. Portrays one’s noble status while still offering considerable protection in battle. \n\nThis great helm carries the colours of house Hesse.

ThingDef.label: heraldic great helm (roxmont)
ThingDef.description: A greatly ornamented full-plate great helmet, often worn by jousters and heraldic champions and notable figures of notable houses in war. Portrays one’s noble status while still offering considerable protection in battle. \n\nWorn by the noble knights and champions of the Roxmont house. Specially fitted with rox fur to provide resistance against the harsh winters of the north.
